name: Singularity Future Technology Ltd.
summary: Singularity Future Technology Ltd. (formerly Sino-Global Shipping America) is a Virginia-based global logistics integrated solution provider founded in 2001. The company primarily provides freight logistics services including shipping, warehousing, collection, last-mile delivery, drop shipping, customs clearance, and overseas transit delivery, mainly serving steel companies. Operations are conducted through subsidiaries in the United States, China, and Hong Kong. The company also changed its name in 2022 to reflect expansion into digital assets business.

products.name: Freight Logistics Services
products.description: Shipping and logistical support primarily for steel companies.

products.name: Warehouse Services
products.description: Warehousing services provided by Brilliant Warehouse Service Inc. in the U.S.

products.name: Last-Mile Delivery
products.description: Last-mile delivery and drop shipping services for customers.

products.name: Customs Clearance
products.description: Customs clearance and overseas transit delivery services.
